summary: Iteration 3 — Backend 49/49 pytest pass (regression). Frontend onboarding + animations + worker privacy reinforcement validated end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844). Admin & Worker first-time login redirect to /onboarding correctly, slide content matches spec, Saltar persists the flag and routes to role-based home, re-login skips onboarding (persistence works), worker UI confirmed €-free across Inicio / Mis obras / Project detail (Resumen/Partes/Fotos/Material — Balance & Equipo correctly absent), worker profile shows the GREEN 'Sin acceso a datos financieros' callout and 'Ver tour de bienvenida' row, manager Ajustes has the same tour row. ONE HIGH BUG: the 'Siguiente' button does not advance slides on web — clicking it 4× keeps the user on slide 0 (FlatList.scrollToIndex without getItemLayout is unreliable in react-native-web). Saltar works as workaround but the intended Siguiente→¡Empezar! flow with rocket icon never reaches the user via Siguiente.

ui_bugs.issue: FlatList 'Siguiente' button (testID=onboarding-next) does NOT advance slides on web. After clicking 4×, user remains on slide 0, the dot indicator stays on the first dot, button text never changes to '¡Empezar!', URL stays /onboarding. RCA: ref.current?.scrollToIndex({...}) without getItemLayout (or onScrollToIndexFailed) is unreliable in react-native-web. Fix: add getItemLayout={(_,i)=>({length:width, offset:width*i, index:i})} to the FlatList, OR replace with ScrollView and scrollTo({x:width*i}). Saltar (skip) works correctly so persistence + routing logic itself is OK — only the Next-slide swipe is broken.

issues: Console warning (web only, non-blocking): 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.' This is expected behavior of react-native-web for Animated.timing(...,{useNativeDriver:true}). On native it will use the native driver. No action needed unless E1 wants to silence the warning by detecting Platform.OS==='web' and setting useNativeDriver:false.
Persistent deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Carry-over from previous iterations, non-blocking.

action_items: FIX: Make onboarding 'Siguiente' actually advance slides. Add getItemLayout to the FlatList in app/onboarding.tsx OR migrate to ScrollView with scrollTo. Without this, the rocket-icon '¡Empezar!' final-slide CTA is unreachable via Siguiente on web (Saltar still works).
(Optional) Avoid useNativeDriver=true on web in src/animations.tsx to silence the recurring console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: src/animations.tsx: empty dependency array in useEffect for FadeInUp is fine for one-shot mount animation, but `value` change in CountUp re-runs correctly thanks to dep [value, duration]. Good.
src/prefs.ts: localStorage access wrapped in try/catch — robust for SSR and private browsing. Key prefix gw_pref_ avoids collision. Correct.

app/onboarding.tsx: scrollToIndex without getItemLayout is the root-cause of the Siguiente bug. Also the SlideView re-renders heavily because each slide checks `active` and conditionally wraps in FadeInUp — this is fine but leads to a pop when index changes; consider always using FadeInUp keyed by active state.
app/index.tsx: gating with prefs.getBool is clean. Loading state shows ActivityIndicator while flag resolves. Good.

success_rate.frontend: ≈92% (1 HIGH bug: Siguiente doesn't advance, all other Iteration-3 flows pass)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Tests reused TEST_-prefixed materials from previous iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-test onboarding: open the public preview URL, run localStorage.clear() in DevTools, login as jefe@elegantglass.es / Admin1234! → expect redirect to /onboarding. After fix, clicking [data-testid=onboarding-next] should advance the page-dots and on the 4th slide the button becomes '¡Empezar!' with rocket icon and routing to /(manager)/dashboard. Persistence key in localStorage: gw_pref_onboarding_<userId>='1'. Same flow for carlos@elegantglass.es / Worker1234! → /(worker)/home. Backend BASE: https://site-glass-preview.preview.emergentagent.com (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). Run: python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v
rca_of_issue: Onboarding Siguiente bug — RCA: react-native-web's FlatList does not implement scrollToIndex deterministically without an explicit getItemLayout prop because it cannot measure off-screen items synchronously (RN Web logs the warning 'scrollToIndex should be used in conjunction with getItemLayout or onScrollToIndexFailed'). As a result ref.scrollToIndex({index:1, animated:true}) is silently ignored, the FlatList stays at offset 0, onScroll never fires with a new contentOffset.x, the index state never increments past 0, and goNext() perpetually triggers scrollToIndex(1) — never reaching slides.length-1 to call router.replace. Reproduction: clear localStorage, login, click Siguiente 4× — observe URL still /onboarding, dot indicator still on first dot. Mitigation in app/onboarding.tsx: add getItemLayout={(_, i) => ({ length: width, offset: width * i, index: i })} to the FlatList (single-line fix). Alternative: use ScrollView ref + scrollTo({ x: width*nextIndex, animated:true }) and detect end of momentum to call setIndex.
